    graphics/poppler: update to 22.12

    The latest stable release is poppler-22.12.0.tar.xz, released on
    December 1, 2022:

    Release 22.12.0:
            core:
             * Form::addFontToDefaultResources: Be stubborn in finding a
               font we can use. Issue #1272

    PR:             268163
    Exp-run by:     antoine
